events: Host cancelled: UNABLE TO PERFORM REQUEST

output:
---
Transaction Summary:
- ATM ID: Not specified in log
- Transaction Type: Cash Withdrawal
- Status: Host Cancelled
- Timestamp: 12:36:11 - 12:38:16


What Happened:
- Customer initiated a Cash Withdrawal.
- Card was verified successfully (TDR_CV→PROCEED_NEXT).
- Customer entered PIN and PIN check passed (TDR_PC→PROCEED_NEXT).
- ATM sent authorization request to host (TDR_AA).
- Host rejected the authorization with UNABLE TO PERFORM REQUEST (TDR_AA→CANCEL_TA).
- Host confirmed the cancellation (TA_EVENT→CANCEL_TA).
- Card was ejected and returned to customer.
- Session ended normally (TDR_SE→PROCEED_NEXT).

Root Cause Analysis:
- Host actively declined the authorization at the business logic level.
- This is not a network failure — the host received and processed the request.
- Host returned UNABLE TO PERFORM REQUEST — specific issuer-side reason not in log.
- Root cause beyond host rejection cannot be determined from available log data.

Recommended Actions:
- Review host-side logs for the rejection reason tied to this transaction UUID.
- Check if the same card is declined across multiple transactions.

Confidence Level:
- High

Transaction Summary:
- ATM ID: Not specified in log
- Transaction Type: Cash Deposit (CIN/CI)
- Status: Unsuccessful — Cancelled by Host
- Timestamp: 21:11:37 - 21:12:45


What Happened:
- Customer initiated a Cash Deposit transaction.
- Card was verified successfully (TDR_CV→PROCEED_NEXT).
- Customer entered PIN and PIN check passed (TDR_PC→PROCEED_NEXT).
- Pre-authorization steps passed (TDR_C2→PROCEED_NEXT, TDR_PERSONALIZE→PROCEED_NEXT).
- Customer selected Checking account (*5042) at 21:11:48.
- Customer confirmed the deposit at 21:12:10.
- Host rejected at overdraft check (TA_OVERDRAFT→CANCEL_TA).
- Card ejected and taken at 21:12:15.
- All deposited cash retracted by the machine (1 x 100 INR, 1 x 500 INR).
- Session ended normally (TDR_SE→PROCEED_NEXT).

Note Discrepancy:
- EJ recorded: 1 x 500 INR.
- JRN recorded: 1 x 100 INR, 1 x 500 INR.
- Both sources agree on total: 600.00 INR.
- Reconciliation review recommended for the note count mismatch.

Root Cause Analysis:
- Host returned CANCEL_TA at TA_OVERDRAFT check — direct log-evidenced cause.
- Host rejected deposit at TA_OVERDRAFT policy check (TA_OVERDRAFT→CANCEL_TA).
- Root cause beyond overdraft rejection cannot be determined from available log data.

Recommended Actions:
- Review host-side logs for rejection reason tied to this transaction UUID.
- Verify retract bin confirms 1 x 100 INR and 1 x 500 INR retracted correctly.
- Investigate note count discrepancy between EJ and JRN.

Confidence Level:
- High

- Medium (due to abnormal app_state_end)

events: Card ejected and taken by customer
Dispense OK — cash successfully dispensed to customer slot
Present timeout — cash not collected within time limit
Present failed — customer did not collect dispensed cash
CASH retracted (not card) — Retract counter Old=6 New=7

output:
---
Transaction Summary:
- ATM ID: Not specified in log
- Transaction Type: Cash Withdrawal (Chained: COUT/GA)
- Status: Incomplete — Cash Retracted (Not Collected)
- Timestamp: 11:15:09 - 11:17:13


What Happened:
- Customer initiated a chained Cash Withdrawal transaction.
- Host requested resubmission of authorization (TDR_AA(GA)→RESUBMIT_AUTHORIZATION) — account selection screen shown.
- Resubmission succeeded — host approved the withdrawal (TDR_AA(GA)→PROCEED_NEXT).
- Host confirmed approval with TC cryptogram (3962) — successful EMV online authorization.
- Card ejected and taken by customer at 11:15:40.
- Cash dispensed successfully (3302 — Valuedoc dispense successful).
- Cash presented to customer slot (3317).
- Present timeout occurred at 11:16:44 — customer did not collect dispensed cash (3319).
- Present failed — cash not taken (3306).
- Cash retracted successfully at 11:17:07 (3307).
- Retract counter changed from 6 to 7.
- CASH_DISPENSER RETRACT error logged (114000) — this is a post-retract notification, not a dispense failure.
- Session ended normally (TDR_SE(GA)→PROCEED_NEXT).
- ATM returned to idle state (OPEN).

Root Cause Analysis:
- Cash was physically dispensed and presented but customer did not collect it within the timeout window.
- ATM automatically retracted the cash after present timeout expired.
- Customer did not collect dispensed cash before present timeout (3319).
- Root cause for customer not collecting cash cannot be determined from available log data.

Recommended Actions:
- Verify retract bin confirms 100 PHP was retracted and logged correctly.
- Flag transaction UUID 0016 for reconciliation — cash was dispensed but not received by customer.
- Check if present timeout is set appropriately for this ATM location.

Confidence Level:
- High

Transaction Summary:
- ATM ID: [value from log]
- Transaction Type: Balance Inquiry (chained into Cash Withdrawal attempt)
- Status: Incomplete — Customer Cancelled
- Timestamp: 11:00:56 - 11:02:03


What Happened:
- Customer initiated a Balance Inquiry.
- PIN verification passed (TDR_SN(PV)→PROCEED_NEXT).
- Host requested resubmission of balance authorization (TDR_AA(BI)→RESUBMIT_AUTHORIZATION).
- Resubmission succeeded — host approved balance inquiry (TDR_AA(BI)→PROCEED_NEXT).
- Timeout screen displayed on balance summary screen at 11:01:38 ([3246]).
- Customer selected YES for print request at 11:01:49 ([3259]) — ATM chained into a Cash Withdrawal attempt.
- Host requested resubmission for withdrawal authorization (TDR_AA(GA)→RESUBMIT_AUTHORIZATION).
- Customer cancelled the transaction at 11:01:55 ([3219]) before withdrawal completed.
- Card ejected and taken at 11:01:57.
- Session ended normally (TDR_SE(GA)→PROCEED_NEXT).
- ATM did not return to idle — app_state_end is TRANSACTION (5). Soft reset may be required.

Root Cause Analysis:
- Balance inquiry completed successfully at host level.
- Customer selected print/YES which triggered a chained withdrawal attempt.
- Customer cancelled before the chained withdrawal authorization completed.
- Customer cancelled the chained Cash Withdrawal attempt ([3219]) after balance was retrieved.
- Root cause for ATM remaining in TRANSACTION (5) state cannot be determined from available log data.

Recommended Actions:
- No action required for the cancellation — customer-initiated.
- Investigate why ATM did not return to OPEN (1) state after session end.
- Consider a soft reset if ATM remains in TRANSACTION (5) state.

Confidence Level:
- Medium (due to abnormal app_state_end)
